narrative:
32 Ohio Senate district has 237,653 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.3 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -0.2% D−R vs +5.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
